allow: Bash(cd /lump/apps/codebase-memory-mcp && go build -o /tmp/cbm-test/cbm-baseline ./cmd/codebase-memory-mcp/ 2>&1 | grep -v "warning:" | head -5 && echo "BUILD OK")
Bash(cd /lump/apps/codebase-memory-mcp && go build -o /tmp/cbm-test/cbm-patched ./cmd/codebase-memory-mcp/ 2>&1 | grep -v "warning:" | head -5 && echo "BUILD OK")

Bash(mkdir -p ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/baseline-snapshot && cp ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/*.db ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/baseline-snapshot/ 2>/dev/null; echo "existing DBs backed up \(or none existed\)")

Bash(echo "=== CEW: Route counts ===" && echo -n "baseline: " && jq '.routes | length' /tmp/cbm-test/baseline-cew-arch.json && echo -n "patched:  " && jq '.routes | length' /tmp/cbm-test/patched-cew-arch.json && echo "" && echo "=== CEW: Baseline routes \(false positives\) ===" && jq '.routes[] | "\\\(.method\) \\\(.path\) -> \\\(.handler\)"' /tmp/cbm-test/baseline-cew-arch.json)
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/lump-apps-conversation-export-workbench.db "SELECT n.name, n.file_path, n.label FROM nodes n WHERE n.label='Route' LIMIT 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/lump-apps-conversation-export-workbench.db "SELECT n.name as route_name, n2.name as handler_name, n2.file_path FROM edges e JOIN nodes n ON e.from_id=n.id JOIN nodes n2 ON e.to_id=n2.id WHERE e.type='HANDLES' AND n.label='Route' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/lump-apps-conversation-export-workbench.db "SELECT r.name as route, r.file_path as route_file, h.name as handler, h.file_path as handler_file FROM edges e JOIN nodes r ON e.source_id=r.id JOIN nodes h ON e.target_id=h.id WHERE e.type='HANDLES' AND r.label='Route' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/lump-apps-conversation-export-workbench.db "SELECT r.name as route, r.file_path as route_file, h.name as handler, h.file_path as handler_file FROM edges e JOIN nodes r ON e.target_id=r.id JOIN nodes h ON e.source_id=h.id WHERE e.type='HANDLES' AND r.label='Route' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/lump-apps-conversation-export-workbench.db "SELECT n.name, n.qualified_name, substr\(n.properties, 1, 200\) FROM nodes n WHERE n.name='conv_to_md' AND n.label='Function';")

Bash(echo "=== hexstrike remaining routes ===" && jq '.routes[] | "\\\(.method\) \\\(.path\) -> \\\(.handler\)"' /tmp/cbm-test/patched-hex-arch.json && echo "" && echo "=== hexstrike remaining api-layer packages ===" && jq '.layers[] | select\(.layer == "api"\) | "\\\(.name\): \\\(.reason\)"' /tmp/cbm-test/patched-hex-arch.json | head -5)
